content.zh:
# “外骨骼专家”更新

以下是本次触发器的重要更新内容与说明，请仔细阅读。

## 1. OCR 战备识别自动装配（Beta）

战备识别功能已作为测试功能加入触发器。你现在可以在 **“设置” - “OCR 自动识别”** 块内框选识别区域，并设定识别快捷键。

### Q：如何使用 OCR 战备识别自动装配？

**A：** 打开游戏，推荐先在单人对局内完成初次配置。

选择你需要携带的战备落地后，展开你的战备栏并使其保持显示，随后点击 **“框选识别区域”** 按钮，框选覆盖你的战备栏。

框选越精准，识别效果越好。

该区域会持久化储存在本地。如果没有问题，后续无需再次框选。

框选完毕后，即可进行正常使用。

使用时，在每局落地后展开你的战备栏并使其保持显示，随后点击你设置的 OCR 识别快捷键。

等待触发器完成识别后，即可收回你的战备栏。你会发现你游戏中携带的战备已经被自动装配在了触发器内。

**需要注意的是，所有黄色战备不参与 OCR 识别，所以请手动配置好黄色战备。**

## 2. 触发器主界面战备锁

由于 OCR 战备识别在自动装配战备时，会直接用识别到的战备替换掉所有未锁定的已装配战备，同时黄色战备还无法识别，所以需要使用战备锁来锁定你的常用黄色战备。

当你的鼠标浮动在战备条上时，战备图标右上角会出现锁定按钮，点击即可锁定。

被锁定的战备不会被自动识别替换。

## Beta 阶段说明

由于 OCR 功能目前处于 Beta 阶段，可能存在意料外的问题，例如：

```text
某个战备识别不到
某个战备被识别错误
中机枪容易识别不到
重机枪可能会同时识别出中机枪和重机枪
120 和 380 可能会搞混
```

建议多尝试几次。

如果某个战备完全无法被识别，请通过 B 站评论或私信向我反馈：

**作者 B 站 UID：86682017**

其他战备应该问题不大。

## 赞助功能

最后，本次更新添加了赞助功能。

如果你愿意支持作者，可以赞助任意金额以支持触发器的维护。

祝游戏愉快。
content.en:
# Exoskeleton Specialist Update

Please read the following important update notes carefully.

## 1. OCR Stratagem Auto Equip (Beta)

OCR stratagem recognition has been added as a beta feature. You can now open **Settings - OCR Auto Loadout** to select a recognition area and set an OCR hotkey.

### Q: How do I use OCR stratagem auto equip?

**A:** Open the game. It is recommended to complete the first setup in a solo mission.

After landing with your selected stratagems, open your stratagem list and keep it visible. Then click **Select Region** and drag over your stratagem list.

The more precise the selected area is, the better the recognition result will be.

The selected area will be saved locally. If everything works, you do not need to select it again later.

After setup, you can use the feature normally.

Each time you land in a mission, open your stratagem list and keep it visible, then press your OCR recognition hotkey.

After the trigger finishes recognition, you can close the stratagem list. The stratagems you brought in-game will be automatically equipped in the trigger.

**Please note that all yellow stratagems are excluded from OCR recognition, so please configure yellow stratagems manually.**

## 2. Stratagem Lock on Main Screen

Because OCR auto equip replaces all unlocked equipped stratagems with recognized stratagems, and yellow stratagems cannot currently be recognized, you should use stratagem locks for your commonly used yellow stratagems.

When your mouse hovers over a stratagem row, a lock button will appear in the upper-right corner of the stratagem icon. Click it to lock that stratagem.

Locked stratagems will not be replaced by OCR auto equip.

## Beta Notes

OCR is currently in beta and may have unexpected issues, such as:

```text
Some stratagems may not be recognized
Some stratagems may be recognized incorrectly
Machine Gun may be hard to recognize
Heavy Machine Gun may match both Machine Gun and Heavy Machine Gun
120 and 380 may be confused
```

Please try multiple times if recognition fails.

If a stratagem cannot be recognized at all, please report it through Bilibili comments or private messages:

**Author Bilibili UID: 86682017**

Other stratagems should generally work fine.

## Sponsorship

Finally, this update adds a sponsorship feature.

If you would like to support the author, you can sponsor any amount to help maintain the trigger.

Have fun.
